overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long NEM Daily ETF (NEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM) stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective NEMG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
